languages.text: "И медикарии воодушевились. Вот она, благосклонность Бога-Императора-то, где! Гляди, руку мне поставили, получше старой будет".

traits.locale_text: "И медикарии воодушевились. Вот она, благосклонность Императора-то, где! Гляди, руку мне сделали, получше старой будет".

languages.text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."
languages.original_text: "И медикарии воодушевились. Вот она, благосклонность Бога-Императора-то, где! Гляди, руку мне поставили, получше старой будет".

traits.locale_text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."
"And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."
"And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."

languages.text: 「そして、医療隊の士気も高まりました。神帝の恩寵です！ほら、私の古い腕よりも良い腕をくれました」
languages.original_text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."

languages.text: "Sıhhiye subayları da şevkli. Tanrı İmparator'un lütfu bu! Bakın, bana eskisinden daha iyi bir kol verdiler."
languages.original_text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."

traits.locale_text: "Sıhhiye subayları da şevkli. Tanrı İmparator'un lütfu bu! Bakın, bana eskisinden daha iyi bir kol verdiler."

languages.text: “医务官们也干劲十足。看啊，这就是神皇的恩典！他们给我换的新手臂比原先的好用多了。”
languages.original_text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."

traits.locale_text: “医务官们也干劲十足。看啊，这就是神皇的恩典！他们给我换的新手臂比原先的好用多了。”

languages.text: "Und die Medicae-Offiziere sind motiviert. Das ist sie, die Gunst des Gottimperators! Die haben mir einen Arm verpasst, der besser ist als mein alter."
languages.original_text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."

traits.locale_text: "Und die Medicae-Offiziere sind motiviert. Das ist sie, die Gunst des Gottimperators! Die haben mir einen Arm verpasst, der besser ist als mein alter."

languages.text: « Et les officiers de medicae sont inspirés, en plus. La voilà, la faveur de l'Empereur-Dieu ! Regardez, ils m'ont donné un bras bien plus performant que celui que j'avais avant. »
languages.original_text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."

traits.locale_text: « Et les officiers de medicae sont inspirés, en plus. La voilà, la faveur de l'Empereur-Dieu ! Regardez, ils m'ont donné un bras bien plus performant que celui que j'avais avant. »

languages.text: «Y los oficiales de medicae están más inspirados. ¡Mira, el favor del Dios Emperador! Me han dado un brazo mejor que el antiguo».
languages.original_text: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."

traits.locale_text: «Y los oficiales de medicae están más inspirados. ¡Mira, el favor del Dios Emperador! Me han dado un brazo mejor que el antiguo».
